case_title: RICHARD FOGEL VS. FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOGEL, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC. $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOGEL, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,485.07 FILED BY FOGEL, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY FOGEL, RICHARD FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-07-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FRY'S ELECTRONICS, INC.
